message:
Welcome to The Unknown Unknown, are you prepared for the challenge?

 *Use `/help` at any time for a list of useful links and commands*
 *Use `/incident` to create an incident record*

Once you're ready just click start to begin Start button
Clicked undefined button
Clicked org button
Clicked undefined button
Clicked Start button
:alarm_clock: - You have 30 minutes to resolve the outage, good luck! You can type `/help` if you need any reminders.
Hey team, getting a few reports now, looks like confusion from the customers on what they ordered?
This is strange
Just seen a couple of reports of customers not receiving the right item on delivery
Hmm? that sounds strange. @reza.imany can you take point and start sizing this up?
its ok in main page , but in product page its wrong
:star: Qualify the problem
details are for watch but picture is for top tank
SEV1-Misleading information in website products
*Incident Number INC100049:* SEV1-Misleading information in website products
:star: Incident record created
Oh no, please let me know what % of sales is affected by this quickly
I've just raised an SEV1 incident, All eys on this please
:star: Take command
Bob Is it impacting all users?
:star: Asking questions to validate impact of the problem
Checking reports...
Yes, look slike its global
I've just raiesd an incident as it looks global, give me 2 minutes and I'll give you updates about impact
:star: Track actions and time box them
Its global issue based on report
One report said the user wanted to buy 'Sunglasses' but he got 'Tank-top' in confirmation
Daniel Could you please start checking whats wrong
Just double checked with shipping looks like the items that has been ordered are correct and we're sending the right item
We have currently got more than 17 complaints so far
I can take a look into our services now
Shay Can you give me a list of recent changes
:star: Check changes done to the platform
Here's the detailed info on each of the changes made today
Bob Do we know when this issue started?
Hope this helps:<https://uptime-labs.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/ULPUBLIC/pages/1186431049/The+Unknown+Unknown+-+Change+Request+Logs>
We don't have any alerts in the system
All apps looks healthy, no errors at all
I am not 100% Sure, but first report was 2 hours earlier
Even i don't see any issue
Gathering more information....
Must be network or platform issue.
Wait one customer noticed that the image is not matching up with the product name
This will actually have a major financial impact.
Are the users able to place orders?
We'll likely see high return rates from customers, that's going to mean a lot of financial loss from shipping and refund costs.
Seems to be that users don't know whether the product they're purchasing matches the image or the description.
If yes, are we sure we are delivering right items ?
We could be shipping the wrong items
Tanya Is there anything changes on platform network or storage services ?
Please let Bez know right away
Can you explain customer impact, what's the user experience like?

Seems to be that users don't know whether the product they're purchasing matches the image or the description.

[3:09 PM] We could be shipping the wrong items
Cart service shouldn't have any impact
Should we put a blockers for orders until fix the issue Bez?
Oh, thats bad
Its on frontend Tanya
what are the options @Reza ?
We are currently looking for finding a root cause
Front end was from Shay
If we ship wrogn items- that will be a huge financial impact
How can we stop orders now ?
Daniel Shay is it safe to roll back front end change?
:star: Reviewed changes
Yes
Now I think even picture in front page is wrong
do that roll back please Shay
Hi @Reza- The orders are still going on
:star: Restoration over root cause analysis
we will have a huge impact - can we stop all orders please
let me check with team and come back to you
Sure i can rollback my change now
Rolling back change....
Daniel Is there any way to stop users to send orders?
any kind of blocker option?
Can we stop all orders, or bring front end down and put a ststus message we are down
Rollback complete.
Can you help us here Hamed ?
:star: Escalating when required
Roll back didn't help
Looks like that didnt work for i still see the issue
Can we put any status message we are under maintanance
Checking now...
no memory or cpu spikes all looks good from Infra nothing to highlight
@Reza, what are we doing to stop orders ?
Although I don't have any data, I strongly believe this issue originates from the application rather than the platform.
No spikes or response time deviations, app owners must check configuration.
This is not an infra problem. If users are seeing mismatched products, someone could be messing with our system otherwise its an application/service-level bug
I don't think it's the change
But it's not a platform issue.
but i can rollback
Hamed Daniel Lets focus on stop order flow first then work on remediation
@reza - we should do damage control first
Shall we stop all orders ? like bring teh front end down and put status message
I'll check with team ,
else, we will have to do a lot of refunds
Yes please
Dan, what are teh options
i can bring front end down and put status message
Stop orders and put under maintanance message on website
its approved by bez
@Reza, Lets do that first ?
Just for approval , I've asking to stop order flow and put under maintanance message on website
Yes
Lets do that
Lets stop orders first yes
I will bring down the frontend down now
Ok the website is now down
@reza.imany How does it look now?
Yeah - right now that the best option - i have put a temporory message
Tanya Could you please do your roll back
Yes, i already did roll back
Daniel Fine , lets find root cause and fix issue
i don't see any diifference
also we need a way to test our changes
The issue could be anywhere, we should look at the configuration mapping between product images and names.
We've stopped users by putting this message on website
Thats better
@Daniel do you know which application holds this data?
now we are working on root cause and fix issue
Lets quickly focus on recoevery
@Tanya ? can you check if this is stored in a database or Redis cache?
@reza.imany if there are no visible errors, this might be a configuration issue; the above details may help narrow it down.
Thanks Hamed
The configuration is stored in the Product Catalogue Service. I pushed a change in UAT yesterday that updates the Redis cache with the latest product names.
Daniel Tanya Could you please get this info and come back in 2 minutes, as website is already down
@Hamed yes, this information is stored in Redis cache and the cache was refreshed earlier today.
what is the possible solution for this issue ? Daniel Tanya?
I can check the database and provide a Redis key dump for product:<id>:name keys
'Redis key dump' means extracting the stored data for specific Redis keys like 'product:<id>:name' so you can see what values are currently saved in the Redis database.
Ok here is what i found
Do that and check it Daniel

```bash
redis-cli get product:3:name 'Sunglasses'```
But product_id: 3 is actually 'mug'
It is, looks like my script has run in PROD and updated the wrong names for each product in DB
Oh no, that not good! Shall we go with a rollback?
ok something fill that redis badly, what is solution Daniel?
Do we have an ETA
We found issue is in one of our databases information stored wrongly, it could be related to a change on lower environments, we are on it
I think i have run my change mistakenly on PROD
Daniel How long it takes to roll back this and fix it?
:star: Manage actions and timings
I think this is cache issue we should clear the cache and restart Product catalogue Service, that will make fresh calls to DB and the cache will be refreshed
No, Dan's query has updated the wrong names in DB. The data is wrong in DB therfore we will have to rehydrate the canonical database with the correct product Id names .
@Tanya, i think you are complicating an easy solution. A restart should fix this
It your call @reza.imany
how long restarting takes?
is it safe to do so?
Can you Summarize the issue real quick - I have to update stakeholder - what exactly is the issu e
Restart shouldn't take long
Can we check Tanya's assumption first?
:star: Ask team members to provide evidence of their assertions
I dont think restart will help
I see teh data in DB itself is wrongly mapped
ok lets fix DB first
We will have to follow below steps to Rehydrate the db.
'Rehydrate the db' means restoring or repopulating the main database with accurate data from a reliable source or backup.
1. **Flush** corrupted product-name keys

```bash
redis-cli --scan --pattern 'product:*:name'| xargs redis-cli del```
2. **Rehydrate** product name cache from canonical DB
teh data in DB itself is wrongly mapped, we are working on this to fix it and once it fixed we hopefully fix the issue
3. **Restart** frontend/product-catalog-service** to refresh in memory cache
:star: Form a working theory
4. **Verify** product listings display correct names
how long this activity takes?
I can perform Step 1 and 2. Dan or Shay has to perform step 3
@reza.imany please verify that all steps have been completed
Are we good to proceed @reza.imany?
go for it
Thanks for go ahead, implementing step 1 now
keep me updated and give me ETA please
Step 1 is now complete
atleast 4 minutes
Moving on to step 2
ok
Step 2 complete
we are working on fixing Redis database and it takes around 4 minutes
lets proceed with the next 2 steps
Starting step 3.....
Shay over to you for step 3
Once all steps are done- i will bring up the Frotn end as well once the issue is fixed
Step 3 is complete
The data looks correct @reza.imany, Can you please verify?
Daniel Can we check before opening gate for everyone?
:star: Cross checking resolution with team
i did restart front end
looks fine to me
Perfect
Bob Hows the customer side?
:star: Cross check resolution with stakeholders
We can see data is correct now
:star: Confirm resolution with the business
I can verify its looking good
waiting for verification from customers
Its positive from customers

Its all done
Thanks Everyone
we are back
How do we handle all the in correct orders @Reza?
Great
Its verified by Customers as well, All good now
This was intense
Whats your suggestion for incorrect orders Bez?
Lets cancel all orders after the issue started and issue a refudn of 10$ as apology
Let me get more information from Bez and come back to you
Else, we will deliver wrong items
Bob Lets cancel all orders after the issue started and issue a refudn of 10$ as apology
Thanks
Noted
Thanks
Looks like we are back to business
Well done everyone

Thank you for playing, We recommend that you take 5 minutes to go and get a drink or stretch your legs.
Once you are back we ask that you complete this retrospective and feedback form, just hit I am ready when you want to start. I am ready button
